name: Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Sift together cocoa powder, flour, salt, and baking soda in a bowl.
3. In another bowl, cream butter and applesauce until smooth.
4. Add sweetener and vanilla extract to the butter mixture; stir until well combined.
5. Beat eggs into the apple sauce mixture until blended.
6. Pour the egg mixture into the dry ingredients and mix until just incorporated.
7. Stir in chopped nuts if using.
8. Spread batter evenly in a greased 8-inch square baking pan.
9. Bake for 20 minutes, or until set.
10. Allow to cool before cutting into squares.
